ain: noun. Alternative form of ayin (“Semitic letter”).
ani: noun. Any bird of the genus Crotophaga in the cuckoo family.
avo: noun. A subdivision of currency, equal to one hundredth of a Macanese pataca.
inion: noun. A small protuberance on the external surface of the back of the skull near the neck; the external occipital protuberance.
inn: noun. Any establishment where travellers can procure lodging, food, and drink.
invasion: noun. A military action consisting of a large armed force of one geopolitical entity entering territory controlled by another such entity,
ion: noun. An atom or group of atoms bearing an electrical charge, such as the sodium and chlorine atoms in a salt solution.
nan: noun. Synonym of maid: a servant girl.
naos: noun. The inner part of an ancient Greek temple, containing a statue of the temple's deity and surrounded by a colonnaded portico; the
nasion: noun. The point at the root of the nose where the frontal and two nasal bones meet. (It is a cephalometric landmark.)
nova: noun. Any sudden brightening of a previously inconspicuous star.
ons: verb. third-person singular simple present indicative of on
sain: verb. To make the sign of the cross on or over something or someone.
savin: noun. The evergreen shrub Juniperus sabina, endemic to Europe, which yields a medicinal oil.
sin: noun. A violation of divine will or religious law.
vain: adjective. Overly proud of oneself, especially concerning appearance; having a high opinion of one's own accomplishments with slight reason.
van: noun. A covered motor vehicle used to carry goods or (normally less than ten) persons, usually roughly cuboid in shape, Depending on the
vas: noun. A vessel or duct transporting any bodily fluid, such as blood, lymph, chyle, or semen.
via: noun. A main road or highway, especially in ancient Rome. (Mainly used in set phrases, below.)
visa: noun. A permit to enter and leave a country, normally issued by the authorities of the country to be visited.
vision: noun. The sense or ability of sight.
ainoi: noun. lauds; a prayer service following matins
avision: noun. A vision of a prophetic or admonitory nature.
isn: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Isanzu.
naio: noun. Myoporum sandwicense, a flowering plant in the figwort family.
nas: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Nasioi.
nina: noun. A hidden message revealed in the completed grid of a crossword.
nis: noun. A nix; a hobgoblin, especially one that resides in a farm house.
noa: adjective. Non-taboo; serving to replace a taboo name or term.
oni: noun. A Japanese evil spirit or demon.
osi: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Osing.
sai: noun. A handheld weapon with three prongs, used in some Oriental martial arts.
san: noun. An Ancient Greek letter representing /s/ (uppercase Ϻ, lowercase ϻ), originally used in some dialects instead of sigma.
sao: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Sause.
sian: adjective. Bored, weary or fed up; tired (of something).
siva: noun. Any of various birds formerly of genus Siva, now part of genus Actinodura, of barwings.
vii: symbol. Ⅶ, the Roman numeral seven (7).
vison: noun. Used as a specific epithet; mink.
